description_long: This object is a bunch of four bananas attached at the stem, with a slightly curved and elongated shape. The bananas have a smooth, semi-glossy yellow peel with some brown spots and minor blemishes, indicating natural handling and aging. Two commercial stickers are visible on the peels, one with the Dole logo and another with product information. The stem is thick, fibrous, and brownish at the top, transitioning to greenish-yellow where it meets the bananas. The bananas are closely packed, with their sides pressed together, and the tips are slightly tapered and rounded. The surface texture appears soft and slightly waxy, with some minor bruising and scuff marks visible on the peels.
description: A bunch of four yellow bananas with minor brown spots, commercial stickers, and a thick fibrous stem. The peels are smooth with some blemishes and the bananas are closely clustered together.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the bunch, highlighting the smooth yellow peels and the gentle curvature of the bananas.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the bunch, with two visible commercial stickers and the thick stem at the top.
description_view_2: This view shows the opposite side, revealing more brown spots and the curvature of the bananas away from the viewer.
description_view_3: This view presents the back of the bunch, focusing on the rounded tips and some minor bruising on the peels.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are mostly intact with some minor bruising, brown spots, and small blemishes. There are no visible tears, splits, or significant peeling, and the surface appears smooth and slightly waxy.
